segments.speaker: example_subject
segments.text: The obvious issue looked like queue latency, but the useful clue was the retry pattern because every failed job came back twice.

segments.speaker: example_subject
segments.text: Before the retry counts were visible, the team debated capacity. After the counts were visible, the fix became a small policy change.

segments.speaker: example_subject
segments.text: Start with the quiet failure. Then make the system say what it already knows.
